hints.text: Plate long white (2022+ format has the coat of arms); **taxi = yellow**
Bollards B&W wedge-shaped, **red front / white back reflector** (blue common too); Croatia's are thinner w/ reflector higher up
Concrete **holey poles** with thin holes reaching the ground; wooden poles also common
**Hungarian**: many acute accents, umlauts, long words; **Ő Ű** (double acute) unique to the language
Street names end in **utca** (street) or **út** (road) — both unique to Hungarian
Green **km markers**; **abnormally tall sign posts**; signs held by **4 bolts** in a tall rectangle (rare elsewhere in E. Europe)
Pedestrian sign **5 stripes, belt very low** ('sagging pants') — unique to Hungary
Road numbers in a **shield shape**; directional signs green (M-highways = blue)
Gen3 antenna often has a small **grey flag** (also CZ/SK/RO/BG); grey dead-looking **winter** Gen3; black Gen4 (no antenna)
Houses stone, light-painted, almost always **red tiled roofs**, single-storey suburbs; bike-lane lines are **yellow**
Road **first digit = a circle around Budapest**; SE very flat (Puszta grasslands), N/W = forested hills; **Lake Balaton** = only large lake, touristy
